_comment: Single source of truth for the governed SDK surface allowlist (AC-074 / REQ-053). Both the Python suite (src/python/tests/test_surface.py) and the TypeScript suite (src/ts/tests/surface.test.ts) load THIS file — there is no per-binding duplicate literal, so the two bindings cannot carry divergent copies (cross-binding parity, P2). Each suite asserts its INTROSPECTED live command surface is a SUBSET of `allowlist` (P1, never equality) and that `core` is present and live. As of Slice 30 the four `read.*` members are LIVE: each suite introspects the `read` namespace and asserts the four verbs are present-in-the-live-surface (a removal fails), in addition to the subset check.
